scope.summary: Redesign the desktop UI into a Zalo-style 3-pane chat layout with shadcn-svelte (icon rail, conversation list, chat pane), wired to the real login/listen/send commands and the zalo://message stream — no mock data.
goals: shadcn-svelte components (avatar, input, scroll-area, separator) added and themed with a Zalo brand blue
A reactive session store derives conversation rows + per-thread messages from the live zalo://message stream
Real browser validation passes against the running app (verify-ui golden path)
nonGoals: Wiring the secondary rail tabs (contacts/cloud/settings) and header action icons — visual placeholders

acceptance.description: svelte-check passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings across the new components + session store.
Real browser validation of the running app passes (page-load, screenshot, console-errors, network-failures).
